title: Consultant Project Management & Digital Transformation (all genders)
required_skills: Digital tools and AI in project context
matched_skills: PMO operations (HSBC USD 8M digital transformation programme)
Agile / Scrum (sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives at Hapag-Lloyd)
Digital tools and AI (Power BI PL-300, JIRA, Confluence, ChatGPT/Claude)
Data analysis and automation (Power BI dashboards, burn-rate reports)
missing_skills: Consulting firm experience (required: 'proven experience in a consulting firm') — candidate has no consulting background
Negotiation-level German (verhandlungssicher / C1+) — candidate is B1, a hard filter for German consulting
Formal PM certification (PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent) — not held
Scrum Master certification or confirmed SM delivery role
Travel willingness within Europe — not stated in CV
core_responsibilities: Lead or support project management, PMO, or Scrum Master role in complex transformation programmes (classic, hybrid, or agile)
Own workstreams from conception through delivery, including planning, steering, and reporting
Apply digital tools and AI-driven approaches to make project work more efficient and data-driven
Facilitate agile ceremonies, promote team collaboration, and ensure adherence to agile principles
Support business development activities such as proposal writing and topic development
recommended_emphasis: Lead with HSBC PMO role: USD 8M programme governance, C-suite reporting, 6-workstream coordination — directly mirrors the PMO and programme steering responsibilities
Quantify agile delivery at Hapag-Lloyd: sprint ceremonies, cross-functional coordination, product owner interface — position as de facto Scrum support role
Highlight Power BI PL-300 certification and AI tool usage (ChatGPT/Claude) as evidence of digital-tools-in-project-context requirement
Frame ECE Group and HSBC business development work (competitive analysis, proposal support) to address BD contribution expectation
Address German language gap proactively — note active improvement (e.g., coursework or test enrollment) if applicable; do not overstate current level
Add any European travel experience or explicit willingness statement to the CV summary or cover letter

company_info.size_raw: Wavestone is an international management consultancy; LinkedIn company profile indicates 1,001–5,000 employees (inferred from JD context: 'internationale Unternehmensberatung' with European footprint)

_scoring_notes.method: required×3 + bonus×1 + responsibility×0.5; penalties applied for hard knockout criteria
_scoring_notes.penalty_reason: Two hard-filter misses: (1) consulting firm experience explicitly required — candidate has none; (2) German B1 vs verhandlungssicher (C1+) requirement — standard knockout in German consulting hiring. Score adjusted from 69 to 52.
_scoring_notes.knockout_risk: HIGH — consulting background and German fluency are typically non-negotiable screening criteria at Tier-1/2 consultancies
